_comment: Per-repo file exclusions for the corpus oracle. Files listed here are excluded from RuboCop inspection via AllCops/Exclude overlay. With rescue_parser_crashes.rb loaded, crashes no longer kill subsequent files, but these exclusions still prevent known-crashy files from producing misleading 0-offense entries. Paths are relative to the repo root (glob syntax, same as AllCops/Exclude).

jruby__jruby__0303464.comment: Lint/LiteralAsCondition crash on bench_compilation.rb; Prism::Translation::Parser crashes on invalid multibyte regex escapes in test files, killing ~1000 files as collateral

ruby__logger__00796ec.comment: Invalid multibyte escape /[\x0-\xff]/ in regex crashes RuboCop parser; only 3 files dropped

cjstewart88__Tubalr__f6956c8.comment: Invalid multibyte escape /[\x80-\xFF]/ in vendored rdoc ruby_lex.rb crashes RuboCop parser, causing all other cops to be skipped for those files

liaoziyang__stackneveroverflow__8f4dce2.comment: Invalid multibyte escape /[\x80-\xFF]/ in vendored rdoc ruby_lex.rb crashes RuboCop parser

infochimps-labs__wukong__437eff1.comment: Too short escaped multibyte character /\xc3[\xa0-\xa5]/ in asciize.rb crashes RuboCop parser

pitluga__supply_drop__d64c50c.comment: Invalid multibyte escape /[\x80-\xFF]/ in vendored puppet zaml.rb crashes RuboCop parser

databasically__lowdown__d593927.comment: Invalid multibyte escape /[\x00-\x08...\177-\377]/ in vendored rails quoting.rb crashes RuboCop parser
